title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-29
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Polly did her daily rounds, checking on all the apps in the greenhouse and updating their health metrics.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse status in the repository.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory and greenhouse documentation up to date with the latest health and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee flying around a cozy greenhouse with a tiny clipboard, checking on pixelated code-plants (representing the apps).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses and holding a small clipboard, inspecting glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm cream gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
